'''payate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ruggedly|ruggedly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-y-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ruggedly|ruggedly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| payate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:payate|payate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:payatesher|payatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:payatesherĂ«m|payatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:payatero|payatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:payateshĂ«|payateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:payateshĂ«m|payateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipayatero|gokipayatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipayateshĂ«|gokipayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipayateshĂ«m|gokipayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopayankerom|gopayankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopayankeshĂ«|gopayankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopayankeshĂ«m|gopayankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopayankeya|gopayankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:payaterom|payaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:payatemu|payatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:payateya|payateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipayaterom|gokipayaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipayatemu|gokipayatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipayateya|gokipayateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:payayate|payayate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:payayatesher|payayatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:payayatesherĂ«m|payayatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:payayatero|payayatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:payayateshĂ«|payayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:payayateshĂ«m|payayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipayayatero|gokipayayatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipayayateshĂ«|gokipayayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipayayateshĂ«m|gokipayayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopayayankerom|gopayayankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopayayankeshĂ«|gopayayankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopayayankeshĂ«m|gopayayankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopayayankeya|gopayayankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:payayaterom|payayaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:payayatemu|payayatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:payayateya|payayateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipayayaterom|gokipayayaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipayayatemu|gokipayayatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipayayateya|gokipayayateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:pĂŠyĂŠte|pĂŠyĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pĂŠyĂŠtesher|pĂŠyĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠyĂŠtesherĂ«m|pĂŠyĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pĂŠyĂŠtero|pĂŠyĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«|pĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m|pĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipĂŠyĂŠtero|gokipĂŠyĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«|gokipĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m|gokipĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopĂŠyĂŠnkerom|gopĂŠyĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«|gopĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gopĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopĂŠyĂŠnkeya|gopĂŠyĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pĂŠyĂŠterom|pĂŠyĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠyĂŠtemu|pĂŠyĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pĂŠyĂŠteya|pĂŠyĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipĂŠyĂŠterom|gokipĂŠyĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipĂŠyĂŠtemu|gokipĂŠyĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipĂŠyĂŠteya|gokipĂŠyĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:pafyafte|pafyafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pafyaftesher|pafyaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafyaftesherĂ«m|pafyaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pafyaftero|pafyaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pafyafteshĂ«|pafyafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafyafteshĂ«m|pafyafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipafyaftero|gokipafyaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipafyafteshĂ«|gokipafyafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipafyafteshĂ«m|gokipafyafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopafyafnkerom|gopafyafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopafyafnkeshĂ«|gopafyafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopafyafnkeshĂ«m|gopafyafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopafyafnkeya|gopafyafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pafyafterom|pafyafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafyaftemu|pafyaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pafyafteya|pafyafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipafyafterom|gokipafyafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipafyaftemu|gokipafyaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipafyafteya|gokipafyafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
